message.content: Explain how the sorting algorithm works in utils.py

content.thinking: The user wants to understand the sorting algorithm. Let me think about how to explain this clearly. The algorithm in utils.py uses a modified merge sort with a cutoff to insertion sort for small subarrays.

content.text: The sorting algorithm in utils.py is a hybrid approach combining merge sort with insertion sort for small subarrays (< 16 elements). This gives O(n log n) worst-case with better constant factors for small inputs.
